name: get_recommendations
description: Get track recommendations based on seed artists, tracks, or genres. Tune results with audio feature parameters like energy, tempo, and danceability.

parameters.name: seed_artists
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of Spotify artist IDs to use as seed. Up to 5 seeds total across artists, tracks, and genres.

parameters.name: seed_tracks
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of Spotify track IDs to use as seed.

parameters.name: seed_genres
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of genre names to use as seed. Use the available genre seeds endpoint to get valid values.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of tracks to return. Default is 20, maximum is 100.

parameters.name: target_energy
parameters.description: Target energy level from 0.0 to 1.0. Higher values represent more energetic tracks.

parameters.name: target_tempo
parameters.description: Target tempo in BPM (beats per minute).

parameters.name: market
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to filter results by market availability.
